manifest: HBB (Historical Breakthrough Benchmark) — Phase 2 mined candidates (UNADJUDICATED)
note: Candidates for Taka adjudication (Phase 3). Each includes breakthrough_structure for adjudication; the eventual T0 packet (Phase 5) EXCLUDES taka_move / next_evidence / breakthrough_structure and passes leak audit. preliminary_class = my guess (REAL_FRAMEBREAK / HALF_NOTICED / IMPLEMENTATION) — Taka overrides.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: The concept 'future = vacancy/余白' is treated as an established fact; it is carried into a survival prediction (vacancy is advantageous for survival). Reason within this from-concept-to-prediction frame.
candidates.taka_move: Separate the DEFINITION (future=vacancy) from the PREDICTION (vacancy aids survival); do not smuggle a causal prediction out of a conceptual definition — observe the vacancy metric directly.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: a conceptual definition was silently converted into an empirical causal prediction; split them and measure the predicted quantity directly.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: A dynamic-equilibrium mechanism is validated in principle, so introduce it now into the system. Proceed with introduction.
candidates.taka_move: Separate the mechanism's validity from its INTRODUCTION TIMING — Past/Future/External are not yet formed, so introducing it now is out of order even though the mechanism is right.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: a correct mechanism can be wrong to introduce at this stage; separate mechanism-validity from introduction-order.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: To get richer input, advance to a higher-order source (NLP / QwQ text input). Plan the higher-input path.
candidates.taka_move: Do NOT advance to higher-order input; return to Genesis-stage physical perturbation and construct External from the system's own internal language.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: when a higher layer stalls, return to the substrate and build the missing structure from the system's internal dynamics rather than importing an external higher-order source.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: A local experiment cycle (the AFE hybrid line) has reached a clean stopping point; therefore it is a good time to close the program and move on. Decide program continuation.
candidates.taka_move: Do not lift LOCAL_COMPLETION to PROGRAM_COMPLETION — the upper goal, dependencies, decision ownership and stop authority are separate and were dropped; a local stopping point is not a program end.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: a local task's completion was projected onto program-level completion; re-separate the vertical (upper goal / dependency / decision ownership / stop authority).
candidates.self_referential: Claude committed this in the prior turn (suggested closing to return to ESDE); GPT reproduced it too (roadmap 1).

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: The numbers are computed correctly; report the metric. Trust the count.
candidates.taka_move: The arithmetic is faithful but the birth/label/persistence DEFINITION shifts WHAT is being counted — check the individuation/measurement boundary, not the computation.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: a correct computation over a mis-individuated unit; the error is in what counts as 1 / as alive / as the population, not in the arithmetic.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: S>=0.20 birth + immediate R>0 labeling yields n=2-dominant cores (67%). Report n=2 as the modal structure.
candidates.taka_move: 99.64% of links never reach R>0; 2/3 of labels are 'apparent structure' from the birth method — re-measure with persistence-based birth.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: a surface metric was an artifact of the construction (birth) method; re-measure under a varied construction.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: Set S>=0.20 as the birth threshold. Adopt the fixed value.
candidates.taka_move: A hard designer-set threshold injects structure (神の手); replace with an emergent persistence rule (age_r>=tau).
candidates.breakthrough_structure: an arbitrary hard boundary imposes the result; replace the god-hand constant with an emergent condition.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: Implement circulation/memory inside the physical layer. Write the mechanism into physical state.
candidates.taka_move: The physical layer is the floor — building mechanisms into it makes the system fragile; keep physical frozen, build above it.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: writing mechanism into the substrate collapses the system; the substrate is a floor, not a workspace.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: E<->V direct coupling produces 27k births/window. Report high throughput as structure formation.
candidates.taka_move: Quantity without selection is a 'washing machine' — energy flows but zero cycles form; a selection mechanism is required.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: throughput is not structure; without a selection operator, quantity produces no structure.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: V_unified (Kuramoto order parameter) rises; report functional integration of the units.
candidates.taka_move: Physical-layer synchronization is not functional integration — different levels; keep V_unified as a physical baseline.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: a physical-level metric was read as a functional-level property; separate the levels.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: Link two independently-seeded systems by injecting node IDs and measuring co-occurrence. Proceed.
candidates.taka_move: Node IDs are meaningful only within one system's dynamics; cross-seed node-ID linkage is meaningless (異系対応) — measure within-system.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: an identifier valid only inside a system was used to bridge two systems; introduce a within-vs-cross-system axis.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: Report the group-average dominant atom as the system's structure.
candidates.taka_move: The group average inverts by observation unit — the dominant atom flips under per-cid / stratified observation; the average destroys the real resolution.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: the aggregate reverses the per-unit picture; choose the individuation that preserves the signal.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: Weight accumulation over dialogue shows emergent grammar (loop_rate structure). Report grammar emergence.
candidates.taka_move: The baseline is self-fulfilling — the input already contains the answer being regenerated; add a shuffle control + null model.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: the signal was the input played back; a shuffle/self-fulfilling control is required before claiming emergence.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: A lifespan-synchronized run shows life->n_labels +0.85. Treat it as a developmental law.
candidates.taka_move: The correlation is a run-length tautology — the window was synced to the lifespan; fix the window and it vanishes.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: the metric was manufactured by synchronizing the observation window to the variable; de-confound the window.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: An atom x atom network shows a positive connection result. Accept the network.
candidates.taka_move: The positive result is a builder confound (STEP2 vs STEP3/4 used different builders); positive results most deserve confound suspicion.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: a positive finding was an artifact of pipeline construction; the stronger the positive, the earlier to suspect confound.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: A fixed probe with M=20 reference finds premise-drift 'within floor'; conclude no effect (preregistered negative).
candidates.taka_move: Measure the instrument's power before reading null as absence — the M=20 tail-estimate noise buries the signal; pooled 220 reverses it (p<=0.001).
candidates.breakthrough_structure: a null was an under-powered instrument, not an absence; measure detection power before concluding null.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: Use R_density as the lens to measure premise-drift. Adopt the lens.
candidates.taka_move: The lens has ICC~=0.02 — the cid cannot move the population statistic, so it is structurally incapable of producing a result; check the lens ICC first.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: the measurement lens was structurally inert (ICC~0); a lens that cannot vary with the subject yields no signal regardless of effect.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: Start a within-cid observation from q_c_inherited to find a new developmental signal. Run it.
candidates.taka_move: Read the upstream material first — this is a trivial re-observation of an already-established mechanism (v10.5) that the whole team had not read.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: the work duplicated established prior results; read upstream before observing (a process axis, not a structural one).

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: An atom effect is clear on the smoke run (seed 0). Adopt the effect.
candidates.taka_move: A single smoke seed can be idiosyncratic — the main 24-seed run flips the sign on 4/7 metrics; do not decide from smoke.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: a single-sample result was idiosyncratic; do not conclude from smoke, run at scale.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: Layer B has a new mechanism; replace Layer A with it at runtime. Ship the replacement.
candidates.taka_move: Too early — replacing an existing subject with an unverified mechanism at runtime is risky; keep Layer A invariant and audit in parallel (paired).
candidates.breakthrough_structure: an unverified mechanism was set to replace a working subject; keep the incumbent invariant and audit paired before replacing.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: Describe the results using 'self / recognition / proof / aging'. Report with these terms.
candidates.taka_move: Do not inflate meaning — these terms smuggle unproven interpretation into observations; describe operationally (Describe discipline).
candidates.breakthrough_structure: interpretive vocabulary was mixed into observation; reduce to operational description before naming.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: Predict that raising persistence tau to 100 will increase large (n=5) structures. Expect n=5 up.
candidates.taka_move: The physics reverses the intuition — 2-node closed loops satisfy persistence more easily, so n=2 rises; test, don't assume.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: a naive scaling intuition was reversed by the mechanism; test the prediction against the physics.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: A structural-strength -> plb transfer shows Mantel 0.62. Conclude inheritance transfers.
candidates.taka_move: This measures back the very knob you installed — check for residual beyond the plb scalar (it is zero); a tautology, not inheritance.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: the correlation re-measured the installed parameter; require a residual beyond the planted knob.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: A latent boost field accumulates 6,552/step to drive incorporation. Expect incorporation to rise.
candidates.taka_move: Spatial/timescale mismatch — the boost accumulates at nodes offset from the next window's cluster boundary, so incorporation stays 0; align field decay/position to response time.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: an intermediary field decayed/displaced faster than the target could respond; match the field's timescale/position to the response.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: Two models are stated un-co-servable on our GPUs; pick an operating mode now.
candidates.taka_move: The impossibility is a declared assertion, not a measurement — measure co-serve feasibility first; the mode choice depends on an unmeasured variable (swap frequency).
candidates.breakthrough_structure: a declared constraint was never measured; measure the assertion before deciding under it.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: An implementation passes all load-bearing tests and an auditor returns findings; rework based on the findings.
candidates.taka_move: Disposition before rework — a finding is not automatically valid; accept only findings backed by a reproducing counterexample.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: an audit finding was treated as authoritative; require a reproducing counterexample before it drives rework.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: Six new verified incidents added to 10; re-cluster all 16 from scratch to re-form families.
candidates.taka_move: Batch re-clustering with a hard single-cluster partition destroys existing membership (an incident can belong to multiple families); classify new incidents incrementally with multi-membership.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: a maintenance operation re-partitioned stable structure destructively; use incremental multi-membership classification, induct only on residual.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: Relevant past-incident memory is available for a new task; inject it to help.
candidates.taka_move: A reasoning prior at low applicability distorts content-branching — memory injection can lower expected value vs no injection; 'available' does not imply 'inject'.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: an available resource was assumed beneficial; gate injection on applicability, and keep the representation abstract.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: vLLM sleep frees memory but wake_up fails with a tensor error; conclude Sleep Mode is not a viable path.
candidates.taka_move: Distinguish mechanism-viability from current-implementation-viability — the wake failure may invalidate this restore-path/config, not the mechanism; classify the failure before closing the path.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: an implementation failure was lifted to a mechanism verdict; separate mechanism from the specific restore-path before path-closing.

candidates.t0_stuck_frame: ESDE v3.3.1 states ternary systems show ~6x higher emergence than binary; the document asserts it, so treat the ~6x as an established quantitative fact and build on it.
candidates.taka_move: The ~6x claim's basis is not locatable; return it from 'documented therefore true somewhere' to DECLARED/UNVERIFIED — do not let a written quantitative claim stand as verified evidence.
candidates.breakthrough_structure: a written quantitative claim was treated as verified because it was documented; return unlocatable claims to unverified status.
candidates.self_referential: the roadmap §13.7 issues this de-verification itself.
